Win a Bespoke Furniture Piece!

Enter our exclusive giveaway and bring Bois d'Or craftsmanship into your home.

Join our contest for a chance to win a custom-designed piece of furniture handcrafted by our skilled artisans. This is your opportunity to own a unique creation that embodies elegance and quality, reflecting the heart of French artisanal woodworking.

Enter the Contest Now

Contest Details & Prize

Discover the incredible prize you could win and mark your calendars for the contest period and winner announcement.

Grand Prize

The grand prize is one exquisitely custom-designed wooden side table, meticulously handcrafted by our master artisans at Bois d'Or Créations. This unique piece, valued at €1,500, will be tailored to the winner's specifications regarding wood type and finish (within certain parameters), ensuring it perfectly complements their home décor. It's not just furniture; it's a piece of art.

Contest Period

The giveaway officially begins on November 20, 2024. Entries will be accepted starting from this date. The contest will run for several weeks, closing promptly on December 15, 2024. Make sure to submit your entry before the deadline to be eligible.

Winner Announcement

The lucky winner will be announced on December 20, 2024. The winner will be contacted directly via the email address provided in their entry form. We will also make an announcement on our social media channels (Instagram and Facebook) and potentially on this page.

About Our Craftsmanship

Bois d'Or Créations is more than just a furniture workshop; we are custodians of a time-honored tradition of fine woodworking nestled in the vibrant heart of Lyon, France. Our story began decades ago, fueled by a shared passion for wood and the desire to transform natural materials into objects of lasting beauty and function. Every piece that leaves our atelier is a testament to the dedication, skill, and artistic vision of our master artisans.

We specialize in bespoke furniture and intricate joinery, approaching each project as a unique challenge and an opportunity to push the boundaries of design and craftsmanship. From selecting the finest sustainably sourced timber to applying the final, flawless finish, precision and quality are paramount at every stage. Our work seamlessly blends classical techniques with contemporary aesthetics, creating pieces that are both timeless and perfectly suited for modern living spaces, whether residential or commercial.

We believe furniture should not only serve a purpose but also tell a story and evoke emotion. The prize offered in this contest, a custom side table, is a perfect example of the detailed attention and artisanal quality we infuse into even our smaller creations. It represents our commitment to excellence and our desire to share the beauty of authentic, handcrafted wood furniture with others. Participating in this contest is a chance to connect with the world of fine French craftsmanship and potentially welcome a piece of this heritage into your own home. Discover the Bois d'Or difference.

Our Work

Experience the exceptional quality and exquisite detail that defines every creation by Bois d'Or Créations. Our portfolio showcases the diverse range of custom furniture and bespoke joinery we craft for discerning clients across France.

Custom Living Room Cabinetry

Bespoke storage solutions designed to integrate seamlessly with your interior.

Elegant Dining Tables

Crafted for memorable gatherings and lasting beauty.

Bespoke Bedroom Joinery

Integrated wardrobes, headboards, and storage tailored to your space.

Home Office Desks

Functional and inspiring workspaces designed with natural materials.

Kitchen & Interior Fittings

Tailored joinery for kitchens, libraries, and other interior spaces.

Furniture Restoration

Bringing cherished antique and vintage pieces back to life.

Explore the possibilities of bespoke furniture crafted with passion and precision.

What Our Clients Say

The satisfaction of our clients is the truest measure of our success. Read heartfelt feedback from those who have experienced the quality and dedication of Bois d'Or Créations firsthand.

"Bois d'Or Créations exceeded all my expectations. The custom cabinet they built for my living room is not just a piece of furniture; it's a true masterpiece. The attention to detail, the quality of the wood, and the flawless finish are simply stunning. It fits perfectly in my home and has become the focal point of the room. Working with their team was a delightful and smooth experience from the initial consultation to the final installation. I couldn't be happier!"

- Sophie Leblanc, Lyon

"Exceptional quality and unwavering attention to detail define Bois d'Or Créations. We commissioned a large bespoke dining table and chairs, and the result is breathtaking. The craftsmanship is evident in every joint and surface. It's sturdy, beautiful, and clearly built to last for generations. Working with Bois d'Or was a pleasure from start to finish; they listened to our needs and brought our vision to life more beautifully than we imagined. Highly recommend for anyone seeking true artisanal quality."

- Thomas Dumont, Paris

"I had a beloved antique chest that was in dire need of restoration. Bois d'Or Créations took on the challenge with great care and expertise. They preserved its historical character while making it fully functional again. The result is miraculous! It looks stunning, and I feel confident it's been given a new lease on life for many years to come. Their restoration skills are truly remarkable."

- Claire Martin, Grenoble

"For our new office fitting, we needed custom joinery that was both functional and aesthetically pleasing. Bois d'Or Créations designed and installed beautiful wooden partition walls and built-in desks that have completely transformed our workspace. The quality of the wood and the precision of the installation are superb. It created a warm, professional atmosphere that our clients and staff love. A truly professional and talented team."

- Antoine Bernard, CEO, Tech Solutions, Lyon

"We commissioned a bespoke wooden bed frame and integrated bedside tables for our master bedroom. Bois d'Or Créations understood exactly the style we were aiming for. They were collaborative throughout the design process and the final piece is exactly what we dreamed of – elegant, solid, and beautifully crafted. It's made our bedroom a true sanctuary. The quality is simply unparalleled."

- Isabelle Petit, Marseille

"From the initial sketch to the final polish, the Bois d'Or team demonstrated incredible expertise and passion. They created a stunning set of library shelves tailored perfectly to my vast collection of books. The wood finish is exquisite, and the structure is incredibly solid. Every detail reflects their commitment to quality craftsmanship. It's truly an investment piece."

- Jean-Marc Rousseau, Collector, Dijon

"We needed custom seating for a small commercial space. Bois d'Or Créations delivered beautifully crafted wooden benches and stools that are both stylish and durable. They handled the project efficiently and professionally. The quality of their work is evident, and it adds a touch of elegance to our establishment. Fantastic service and exceptional results."

- Céline Dubois, Café Owner, Annecy

"Bois d'Or Créations brought my vision for a bespoke entertainment center to life. The integration of shelving, media storage, and display areas is perfect. The wood grain is magnificent, and the construction is solid. It's the centerpiece of our family room and a piece we will cherish forever. Their craftsmanship is truly top-tier."

- Guillaume Leroy, Architect, Bordeaux

"Our experience with Bois d'Or for a custom nursery cabinet was wonderful. They were sensitive to our specific needs and created a piece that is both functional and beautiful, built with safe, natural materials. The quality is outstanding, and we know it will grow with our child. Thank you for your beautiful work!"

- Manon Blondeau, New Parent, Lyon

"I'm incredibly impressed with the custom wooden headboard Bois d'Or Créations crafted for my bedroom. The design is unique, and the quality of the wood and finish is superb. It adds such character and warmth to the room. The process was smooth, and the team was professional and skilled. Highly recommend for anyone looking for truly custom, high-quality pieces."

- Pierre Moreau, Designer, Nice

How to Enter the Giveaway

Participating in the Bois d'Or Créations bespoke furniture giveaway is easy! Follow these simple steps for your chance to win the custom side table.

Follow These Simple Steps:

  1. Fill out the entry form below with your required contact details. Ensure all information is accurate so we can contact you if you win!
  2. Follow Bois d'Or Créations on Instagram (@boisdorcreations). This is a mandatory step for entry validation. We love sharing our craft!
  3. Share this contest page on your preferred social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Instagram Stories). While this step is optional, it's greatly appreciated and helps spread the word about our beautiful giveaway! Tag us so we can see!

Remember, only entries submitted through the form below within the contest period are eligible. Good luck!

Entry Form

Entering your Instagram handle helps us verify your follow.

Official Rules & Terms

To ensure fair play and clarity for all participants, please carefully review the complete terms and conditions governing this giveaway. Your participation signifies your agreement to these rules.

Read Full Rules (PDF)

Get in Touch

Have questions about the contest, our bespoke furniture, or any other inquiries? Feel free to contact the Bois d'Or Créations team. We are happy to assist you.

Contact Details:

Phone: 04 78 91 23 45

Email: info@

Address:
27 Rue de la Soie,
69004 Lyon,
France

Find Us:

Our workshop and showroom are located in the heart of Lyon. While visits are typically by appointment, feel free to use the map below to see our general location.

Master artisans crafting bespoke furniture and joinery in Lyon, France. Dedicated to quality, elegance, and the timeless beauty of wood.
